event: taking 60 tablets of 0.6 mg of colchicine as an intentional overdose
results of a comprehensive toxicology screen were negative
transthoracic echocardiogram revealed normal biventricular function
sepsis from an intrabdominal source was suspected
initial readings were consistent with distributive shock
pulmonary artery diastolic pressure 8 mm Hg
pulmonary artery diastolic pressure 24 mm Hg
transesophageal echocardiogram revealed new severe biventricular failure
sepsis with stress induced cardiomyopathy considered
myocarditis with severe biventricular failure considered
packed red blood cell transfusion with 10 U of PRBCs initiated
white blood cell count continued to fall
repeat echocardiogram showed recovery of LVEF to 50% to 55%
admitted to taking 60 tablets of 0.6 mg of colchicine as an intentional overdose
spent a total of 15 days in the intensive care unit
